metadata.title: Conversación: En la calle
metadata.description: Sequential dialogue between a young man and a police officer.

sentences.original: Joven: Disculpe usted, señor policía. ¿Sabe dónde está el cine?
sentences.translation: Young Man: Excuse me, officer. Do you know where the cinema is?

sentences.original: Policía: Hay muchos cines aquí. ¿No sabe usted cómo se llama el cine?
sentences.translation: Officer: There are many cinemas here. Don't you know what the cinema is called?

sentences.original: Joven: Creo que se llama Teatro Capri.
sentences.translation: Young Man: I think it is called Capri Theater.

sentences.original: Policía: ¡Ah!, sí. Está en la calle Juárez, cerca del parque.
sentences.translation: Officer: Oh!, yes. It is on Juarez Street, near the park.

sentences.original: Joven: ¿Está lejos de aquí?
sentences.translation: Young Man: Is it far from here?

sentences.original: Policía: No. Está a cinco minutos de aquí, en esa dirección.
sentences.translation: Officer: No. It is five minutes from here, in that direction.

chunks.text: Está a cinco minutos de aquí,
chunks.meaning: It is five minutes from here,

sentences.original: Joven: Muchísimas gracias, señor policía.
sentences.translation: Young Man: Thank you very much, officer.

sentences.original: Policía: De nada, joven, para servirle.
sentences.translation: Officer: You're welcome, young man, at your service.

sentences.original: Disculpe usted, ¿dónde está la biblioteca?
sentences.translation: Excuse me, where is the library?

sentences.original: Disculpe usted, ¿tiene la hora?
sentences.translation: Excuse me, do you have the time?

sentences.original: Mi casa está cerca de la escuela.
sentences.translation: My house is near the school.

sentences.original: El hotel está cerca del restaurante.
sentences.translation: The hotel is near the restaurant.

sentences.original: El museo está lejos de aquí.
sentences.translation: The museum is far from here.

sentences.original: Vivimos lejos de la ciudad.
sentences.translation: We live far from the city.

sentences.original: Muchísimas gracias por el regalo.
sentences.translation: Thank you very much for the gift.

sentences.original: Muchísimas gracias por su ayuda hoy.
sentences.translation: Thank you very much for your help today.

sentences.original: El joven estudia medicina.
sentences.translation: The young man studies medicine.

sentences.original: Aquel joven es mi primo.
sentences.translation: That young man is my cousin.

sentences.original: Es un placer, para servirle.
sentences.translation: It is a pleasure, at your service.

sentences.original: Aquí tiene su café, para servirle.
sentences.translation: Here is your coffee, at your service.
